stages.notes: Manual transcription from invoice-full.png; Desc. 20,00% · Valor 26,52 printed clearly
Post-fix crop top=386 includes Farina row (mammafiore-investigation). Row-band OCR on correct region returns total 26.52.

line_total_net.digitError: 26 → 25 in euros digit of Valor column

iva_column.note: Unlike Rulo (IVA 6,00 copied as total), Farina total is NOT 6.00

stages.notes: Pass C reads Pr. Unitário and Desc. correctly but misreads Valor 26,52 as 25,52. Binder derives unit_price=26.52 from gross+discount while preserving wrong line_total_net.
Binder correctly derives net unit (33.154 × 0.80 = 26.52) but copies wrong line_total_net to total. No Rule B/E correction — arithmetic is internally inconsistent (unit > total) but not caught.
reconcileLineItemAmounts does not alter Farina total (discount-line-audit confirmed for Mammafiore discounted rows)

mathTrace.discountCheck: 33.154 × (1 − 0.20) = 26.5232 ≈ 26.52 — confirms visible Valor is net after 20% discount
